description: The background-screening order an employer submits to a consumer reporting agency (CRA) for a candidate, under an FCRA permissible purpose. Notarize-only: this records that the order was placed, against which candidate, package, and CRA, with the candidate's prior disclosure+authorization on file (FCRA 604(b)(2): a standalone disclosure and the candidate's written authorization are a precondition to ordering an employment report). The CRA renders the adjudication downstream (ironvale-consumer-report-v1, the SoR-seam). permissiblePurpose is the FCRA basis for pulling the report; disclosureConsentRef points at the retained disclosure+authorization artifact (the recipe does not hold the signed consent itself, only a reference/hash to it).

cra.description: The consumer reporting agency the order was placed with, e.g. 'Accurate Background'.

packageType.description: The screening package ordered, captured verbatim from the CRA (e.g. Accurate PKG_BASIC/PKG_STANDARD/PKG_PRO). Free-form: a closed enum would reject a package this recipe didn't anticipate on a different CRA.

permissiblePurpose.description: The FCRA permissible purpose for the pull. This vertical is employment screening (FCRA 604(a)(3)(B)); the enum is single-valued on purpose to refuse a mis-scoped non-employment pull under this recipe.

jobLocation.description: Work location for the role (drives state/local overlay obligations — CA/NYC etc.). Optional; load-bearing when a state overlay applies.

disclosureConsentRef.description: Reference/hash to the retained FCRA 604(b)(2) standalone disclosure + candidate written authorization (held out-of-band; this is the audit pointer, not the signed document).
